name: Wiki!Sans
description:
Wiki (or preferably known as Wiki!Sans) is an entity created by Painted Hen on Dec 26, 2021. Inspired by a glitch in one of the pictures in the Undertale wiki, they reside within the articles; causing errors where ever they go. It is unknown where they came from, or if they're capable of infecting beyond the Undertale Wiki itself.

least creepiest creepy sans imo
creator: Eclipse_Werewolf
